lesson: PGM auto-unstick parses ## Dependencies sections and checks issue states — keep dependency format consistent across issues
fix: Added _check_stuck_dependencies() to PGM bash pre-checks with _parse_dependencies() static parser

lesson: Standalone test scripts should be truly self-contained — no shared imports, even if it means duplicating connection config across files.
fix: Each script gets its own SERIAL constant and run_test helper rather than a shared test_utils module.

lesson: Hybrid event architecture (SDK events + NUC bus) avoids reinventing hardware event plumbing while keeping custom compute events lightweight.
fix: Use SDK events for hardware (cliff, touch, face), NUC bus for AI-computed events (YOLO, follow state, STT).

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch REPO_MAP drift early — always update REPO_MAP.md when adding new directories.
fix: Added apps/vector/tests/standalone/ to REPO_MAP.md with a Testing section explaining both test locations.

lesson: Auto-generated doc-check issues after merges catch REPO_MAP.md drift early — keep the post-merge hook.
fix: Added events/ directory to REPO_MAP.md to match actual file structure from PR #43.

lesson: Safety-critical event ordering matters — emit action-triggering events (emergency_stop) before diagnostic events (cliff_triggered) to avoid delaying motor stop.
fix: Reordered event emissions in SdkEventBridge to emit emergency_stop before cliff_triggered.

lesson: CI environment lacks NUC-only packages (anki_vector, cv2) — tests that lazily import these need sys.modules stubs in conftest and CI pip deps must include opencv-python-headless
fix: Added anki_vector stub in tests/vector/conftest.py and opencv-python-headless to qa-pipeline.yml CI deps

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch REPO_MAP drift for new files, not just directories — always add new runtime files to REPO_MAP.md.
fix: Added sensor_handler.py to apps/vector/src/ section of REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: CLAUDE.md doc updates for new agent features need Ophir approval — auto-generated doc-check issues track what needs updating after merges.
fix: Documented PGM auto-unstick behavior and ## Dependencies convention in CLAUDE.md

lesson: 61% of dispatch cycles wasted on rebases and pre-existing CI — auto-rebase in merge gate and doc-only PR filtering are highest-impact workflow fixes.
fix: Added _auto_rebase_pr() to merge gate, doc-only PR skip in _post_merge_doc_check(), main_ci_healthy() pre-dispatch warning.

lesson: OpenVINO setup scripts should be standalone and idempotent — download to MODEL_DIR not CWD, use pip3 not pip, lazy-import heavy deps.
fix: chdir to models/ before YOLO export, pip3 in setup.sh, numpy imported inside benchmark functions

lesson: Lazy-import anki_vector inside functions (not at module level) so CI stubs work — conftest must stub all used submodules (util, events).
fix: Moved anki_vector import into run_health_check() and degrees import into check_head() fn closure; added anki_vector.util stub to conftest.

lesson: Position-only Kalman (cx,cy) with frozen bbox dimensions prevents the oscillation that plagued R3 — never predict bbox w/h since YOLO sizes vary naturally.
fix: State vector [cx,cy,vx,vy] only; w/h frozen at last YOLO measurement, updated only in update() never in predict().

lesson: Avoid pytest assertion rewrite on large list comparisons (e.g. list(img.getdata())) — use tobytes() for pixel data comparison to prevent pytest hanging on diff generation.
fix: Used img.tobytes() instead of list(img.getdata()) for all pixel comparison assertions in display tests.

lesson: SDK AudioFeed signal_power field contains raw PCM audio (1600 int16 at 15625 Hz), not power metadata — proto field names are misleading.
fix: Parse signal_power as int16 LE PCM, resample 15625->16000 Hz via linear interpolation for STT/wake word compatibility.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch missing standalone test files in REPO_MAP.md — always add new test scripts to the map.
fix: Added test_mic.py to apps/vector/tests/standalone/ section of REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: CLAUDE.md doc updates from post-merge hooks need human-approved label since CLAUDE.md is immutable — workers can edit once approved.
fix: Added Kalman filter tracker to Inference Pipeline and Communication diagrams in CLAUDE.md.

lesson: Scene describer with graceful degradation — YOLO and LLM both optional with empty-result fallback — prevents pipeline failures when models or API keys are missing.
fix: Lazy-load YOLO model with _yolo_loaded flag; return empty string from LLM on missing SDK/key/error instead of raising.

lesson: Lazy-import cv2 inside methods and mock via sys.modules patch.dict in tests — module-level patch fails when imports are deferred.
fix: Used patch.dict(sys.modules, {"cv2": mock_cv2_mod}) fixture instead of patch("module.cv2") for lazy-loaded cv2.

lesson: Hybrid wake word (SDK event + openwakeword) avoids single-point-of-failure — SDK for reliability, OWW for customization. Track chunk_count to deduplicate audio in polling loops.
fix: Used AudioClient.chunk_count to skip already-processed chunks in OWW polling loop; separated OWW threshold from SDK threshold.

lesson: PersonDetector should reuse existing Detection dataclass from kalman_tracker — avoids duplicate types and ensures seamless KalmanTracker.update() compatibility.
fix: Import Detection from kalman_tracker instead of defining new dataclass; pass classes=[0] to ultralytics for server-side COCO filtering.

lesson: Head controller is a thin wrapper — lazy-import anki_vector.util.degrees inside set_angle() for CI compatibility, use static clamp method for testability without robot.
fix: Static clamp() method testable without mocks; lazy import of degrees() inside set_angle(); conftest stub returns identity for degrees().

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch missing control modules in REPO_MAP.md — always add new src/ files to the map.
fix: Added head_controller.py to apps/vector/src/ section of REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: SDK set_lift_height uses normalised 0.0-1.0 range (not mm) with optional max_speed — pass preset name through internal _preset param to avoid duplicate event emission.
fix: Added _preset keyword-only arg to move_to(); move_to_preset passes it through for single-event emission.

lesson: Cliff-safe motor control needs a single _safe_drive choke point — backup reactions must bypass it (otherwise deadlock) but all user-facing motor methods must go through it.
fix: _handle_cliff_reaction calls robot.behavior.drive_straight directly; all public methods (drive_wheels, drive_straight, turn_in_place, turn_then_drive, ramp_wheels) route through _safe_drive.

lesson: Voice bridge uses stdlib urllib multipart for OpenAI STT — no requests dependency needed. State machine with threading.Lock prevents concurrent wake word re-entry.
fix: Single _state_lock guards IDLE check + transition; _interaction_loop runs in daemon thread with try/finally to always reset to IDLE.

lesson: Vector SDK has no SetBackpackLights gRPC — backpack LEDs only controllable via animation engine; use set_eye_color(hue, saturation) as primary visual state indicator.
fix: Built LED state manager around set_eye_color API with priority-based states and animated patterns (breathing, blinking, hue cycling) driven by NUC-side animation thread.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch missing controller modules in REPO_MAP.md — always add new src/ files to the map.
fix: Added led_controller.py, lift_controller.py, motor_controller.py, display_controller.py to apps/vector/src/ section of REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: Monocular visual SLAM fuses ORB rotation with motor dead reckoning for scale — camera alone cannot determine absolute distance on Vector.
fix: VisualOdometry extracts rotation via essential matrix; VisualSLAM uses MotorCommandEvent for distance; Bresenham marks traversed grid cells free.

lesson: Dedicated SpeechOutput module with sentence-aware chunking replaces inline truncation — chunk_text is a static method testable without robot, and SpeechOutput emits single TTS_PLAYING start/stop pair across all chunks.
fix: Static chunk_text splits on sentence boundaries then whitespace; speak() wraps all chunks in one TTS_PLAYING event pair for echo suppression.

lesson: Follow planner state machine (IDLE→SEARCHING→TRACKING→FOLLOWING) with PD controller for differential drive — dead zones on both turn and drive prevent jitter, PD reset on state transitions prevents derivative kick.
fix: FollowConfig dataclass externalizes all gains/thresholds; PDController.reset() called on every state transition; search is sequential (head sweep then body rotation) with running checks for early exit.

lesson: Echo suppression is trivial with blocking say_text() — centralized EchoSuppressor subscribes to TTS_PLAYING events and flushes AudioClient buffer on TTS stop, preventing echo-contaminated audio from reaching STT.
fix: EchoSuppressor coordinator with configurable holdoff + AudioClient.clear_buffer() for ring buffer flushing after TTS playback.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch missing planner files in REPO_MAP.md — always expand directory listings when new files are added.
fix: Added visual_slam.py and __init__.py to planner section of REPO_MAP.md with expanded description.

lesson: aiohttp bridge needs pytest-aiohttp for test client and aiohttp in CI deps — use standalone _make_mock_conn() factory instead of shared async fixtures to avoid pytest-asyncio version conflicts.
fix: Each test creates its own mock_conn via _make_mock_conn() and passes it to create_app(); added aiohttp + pytest-aiohttp to CI install step.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch R3 API remnants in SKILL.md — bridge routes.py is the source of truth for endpoint contracts, not the old R3 skill docs.
fix: Rewrote SKILL.md to match routes.py: /move uses type-based dispatch, /led uses hue/saturation, /say replaced by /audio/play, added /head /lift /display endpoints.

lesson: Golden test rewrite needs exact constructor signatures verified against source — positional arg order differs across PersonDetector, KalmanTracker, FollowPlanner, and constants may be module-level not class-level.
fix: Used keyword args for PersonDetector(event_bus=), verified KalmanTracker() takes no bus, FollowPlanner(motor, head, bus) order, imported module-level MIN_ANGLE/TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE directly.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch renamed golden test files and new test directory structures in REPO_MAP.md — always update both old and new paths.
fix: Renamed golden_test.py to golden_test_r3_archived.py in test_harness section and added full tests/golden/ hierarchy to tests/ section of REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: Expression engine sits on top of existing controllers using only public APIs — use LedController.override() for transient emotion colors rather than accessing private methods.
fix: Unified express() with _trigger param eliminates code duplication; short-lived override(duration_s=0.05) replaces _clear_override() for idle transition.

lesson: MD file consistency requires updating ALL copies of a skill file (apps/, infra/, workspace) and cross-checking references in OPENCLAW-CONFIG.md — review hooks will reject if any copy still references old IPs.
fix: Grepped repo-wide for old IP before committing; updated apps/openclaw, infra/openclaw, workspace SKILL.md, and OPENCLAW-CONFIG.md in same commit.

lesson: Process supervisor uses SDK connection_lost event (not custom gRPC pinging) for disconnect detection — factory closures must capture self._robot at registration time, and resume must preserve non-connection component state.
fix: _register_components captures robot at call time; _resume_connected_components preserves non-connection component instances before re-registering factories with fresh robot reference.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch missing supervisor entry point in REPO_MAP.md — always add new top-level module files and update Key Entry Points.
fix: Added __main__.py and supervisor.py to apps/vector/ section and Vector Supervisor to Key Entry Points in REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: Intercom module is a thin HTTP client to existing intercom-server.py — delegate photo capture to the server side to avoid duplicating bridge /capture logic.
fix: Intercom.send_photo() POSTs caption-only JSON to /intercom/photo; server fetches frame from bridge /capture and handles Signal delivery.

lesson: LiveKit Python SDK VideoSource accepts RGBA frames from PIL — JPEG→PIL→RGBA→VideoFrame is the decode path. AudioSource.capture_frame is async. Track frame_count/chunk_count to avoid re-publishing duplicate frames.
fix: Poll CameraClient.frame_count and AudioClient.chunk_count to detect new data before publishing; use PIL.Image.open + convert(RGBA) for video frames.

lesson: Signal physical test framework reuses existing signal-interactive.sh and run-physical-test.sh — new scripts only need to define test categories and bridge HTTP calls, the inbox #go handler and PID tracking already work.
fix: Added vector-physical-test.sh with 9 test categories using bridge_get/bridge_post helpers, plus single-line inbox.py whitelist entry.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks must add BOTH source files AND their test files to REPO_MAP.md — check issue description for all requested entries.
fix: Added intercom.py to apps/vector/src/ and test_intercom.py to tests/vector/ sections of REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch LiveKit bridge endpoints as stubs in SKILL.md — update all 3 copies (apps/, infra/, workspace) with actual request/response format from routes.py.
fix: Replaced stub /call/start and /call/stop docs with full request/response format; added livekit_bridge.py and audio_client.py to REPO_MAP.md.

lesson: Dual-path voice routing: wire-pod intents map directly to bridge HTTP endpoints for simple commands, OpenClaw agent handles natural language for everything else — no standalone command parser needed.
fix: VoiceCommandRouter subscribes to USER_INTENT events with configurable intent→action map; OpenClawVoiceBridge handles custom commands via hooks endpoint; both emit COMMAND_RECEIVED on shared NUC bus.

lesson: Camera-based obstacle avoidance uses YOLO bbox area ratio as distance proxy — no depth sensor needed. Forward cone filter (center 60%) + person exclusion + frame debounce prevent false positives.
fix: ObstacleDetector with three zones (danger/caution/clear), ObstacleConfig dataclass for tuning, escape maneuver capped at 3 attempts, cliff events set danger zone immediately.

lesson: Head tracking extracts cleanly into standalone HeadTracker module — use update() for synchronous FollowPlanner integration and start() for standalone event-driven mode.
fix: HeadTracker.update() applies tracking immediately without control loop; FollowPlanner delegates via update() to avoid double event-bus subscription.

lesson: Message relay intercepts STT before OpenClaw — regex pattern matching on NUC side avoids round-trip to agent for simple relay commands like tell Ophir.
fix: MessageRelay.try_relay() checks patterns first in OpenClawVoiceBridge._interaction_loop(); returns confirmation text on match so caller skips OpenClaw entirely.

lesson: When refactoring or disabling modules, also update imports AND tests — stale test mocks/methods cause CI failures even though lint passes locally.
fix: Removed unused DisplayController import, deleted stale _pcm_to_audio_frame tests, fixed _audio_pub_task→_audio_sub_task in cleanup test, updated display test mock for PlayAnimation path.

lesson: Raw protobuf imports (anki_vector.messaging.protocol) fail in CI where SDK is not installed — use high-level SDK APIs (robot.anim.play_animation) which are mockable and CI-safe.
fix: Replaced PlayAnimationRequest protobuf call with robot.anim.play_animation(); removed 3 obsolete PCM tests; fixed _audio_pub_task → _audio_sub_task attribute name.

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch stale mic-publish references in REPO_MAP and SKILL.md — always update all 3 SKILL.md copies (apps/, infra/, workspace).
fix: Updated livekit_bridge.py description to camera-only in REPO_MAP.md and all 3 SKILL.md copies.

lesson: Mic audio publishing via AudioClient subscriber queue is non-blocking — use get_nowait() not get(timeout) in async coroutines to avoid blocking the event loop.
fix: Re-enabled mic audio LiveKit track using subscriber queue pattern; switched blocking get(timeout=0.05) to get_nowait() + asyncio.sleep().

lesson: Post-merge doc checks catch stale camera-only LiveKit descriptions after mic audio re-enabled — always update REPO_MAP.md, both in-repo SKILL.md copies (apps/, infra/), and the live workspace copy.
fix: Updated livekit_bridge.py description to camera + mic in REPO_MAP.md, 2 in-repo SKILL.md copies (apps/, infra/), and workspace SKILL.md (outside repo, updated separately).

lesson: Follow pipeline status endpoint is pure read-only aggregation — FollowPipeline.get_status() collects from detector/tracker/obstacle/planner properties that already have internal locks, so no new synchronization needed.
fix: Added get_status() to FollowPipeline and GET /follow/status route in routes.py; fixed stale 501 stub tests to use proper pipeline mocks.

lesson: When rebasing feature branches, verify CI fixes from previous dispatches actually landed — step-function adaptive confidence was already on main from a parallel commit, requiring replacement rather than addition.
fix: Reset branch to origin/main, replaced existing _adaptive_confidence() step function with _adaptive_threshold() linear interpolation; also fixed pre-existing hForColorComponents OpenCV kwarg bug.
